description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS CI that runs on every push and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a single macos-latest job that installs dependencies, caches pyenv, installs Python 3.8.0 if necessary, checks out the repository, caches third-party packages, builds BioDynaMo with CMake and Ninja, runs unit tests, and notifies Slack on success, failure, or cancellation.
